latHint: Think indications of what's to come - not road signs.
pivHint: Highway SIGNS point the way - but 'SIGNS of trouble ahead' are also called what?
winText: A telling indication. SIGNS was the pivot - road SIGNS to ominous OMENS.
lossText: OMENS - SIGNS of what's to come. SIGNS was the pivot: highway SIGNS to reading the OMENS.
